prompt: Create a soft, nostalgic film photograph in a vertical 2:3 frame. A young woman with dark brown shoulder-length hair sits alone at a wooden classroom desk, reading an open paperback book held in both hands. She wears a cozy oversized cream white ribbed knit sweater with long sleeves. Her face is fully obscured by a centered opaque square privacy block in a muted dark gray-brown color, covering the facial features but leaving her hair and body visible. The setting is a quiet, empty classroom with pale beige wooden desks and chairs arranged in rows, softly out of focus behind her. Place the subject slightly right of center, seated near a large window on the right side; daylight streams in through the window, creating a hazy, overexposed, dreamy atmosphere with low contrast and gentle shadows. Use natural muted colors, visible film grain, slight blur, shallow depth of field, and the look of a candid 35mm analog photo. No readable text, no logos, no extra people, no dramatic posing.
